the AMO013 response should be successful

description:
As APISYS
  I want to call the merchant transfer in API
  So that I can credit funds into the member wallet

elements.name: Transfer in increases wallet balance

steps.name: a merchant member exists
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer in with:
the AMO010 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 75.125

elements.name: Repeating the same transfer_no is idempotent

steps.name: a merchant member exists
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer in with:
the AMO010 response should be successful
the response should contain:
I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo010_reference_id"
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 50
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer in with:
the AMO010 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged

steps.name: a merchant member exists

the AMO010 response should be successful

name: AMO010 Request Transfer In

description:
As APISYS
  I want to call the merchant transfer out API
  So that I can debit funds from the member wallet

elements.name: Transfer out decreases wallet balance

steps.name: a merchant member exists
the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>"
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer out with:
the AMO011 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 20.5

elements.name: Repeating the same transfer_no is idempotent

steps.name: a merchant member exists
the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>"
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer out with:
the AMO011 response should be successful
the response should contain:
I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id"
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 15
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer out with:
the AMO011 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged

elements.name: Insufficient balance returns failed status

steps.name: a merchant member exists
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
I prepare an amount exceeding the balance by 10
APISYS requests transfer out with:
the AMO011 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged

elements.name: Not providing amount transfers out all integer wallet balance

steps.name: a merchant member exists
the member has positive wallet balance in "<currency>"
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer out with:
the AMO011 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the response amount should equal the integer part of the recorded wallet balance in "<currency>"
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should equal the remaining decimal balance

name: AMO011 Request Transfer Out

description:

  I want to call the merchant cancel transfer API

the AMO014 response should be successful
the response should contain:

APISYS requests cancel transfer with:
the AMO014 response should be successful
the response should contain:

APISYS requests cancel transfer with:
the AMO014 response should be successful
the response should contain:

APISYS requests cancel transfer with:
the AMO014 response should be successful
the response should contain:

steps.name: a merchant member exists
APISYS requests cancel transfer with:

name: AMO014 Request Cancel Transfer

description:
As APISYS
  I want to call transfer APIs in sequence
  So that I can verify wallet balance changes and transfer reversal end to end

elements.name: Transfer in, transfer out, cancel transfer, and idempotent cancel

steps.name: a merchant member exists
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer in with:
the AMO010 response should be successful
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 100
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests transfer out with:
the AMO011 response should be successful
I store the response field "reference_id" as "amo011_reference_id"
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should decrease by 35
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests cancel transfer with:
the AMO014 response should be successful
the response should contain:
I store the response field "reference_id" as "cancel_reference_id"
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should increase by 35
I record the current wallet balance in "<currency>"
APISYS requests cancel transfer with:
the AMO014 response should be successful
the response should contain:
the wallet balance in "<currency>" should remain unchanged

name: Integration Flow - Transfer wallet lifecycle
